title: Sanitized signal exporter
objective: Export privacy-preserving sanitized run signals from Target Repo runs for Meta-level improvement analysis without raw code, raw docs, raw logs, or secrets.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Define sanitized-signal.schema.json with fields for generatorVersion, executionProfile, taskType, result, failureCategory, reasonCodes, metric buckets, and privacy flags.
Add exporter command or runner hook that creates sanitized-signal.json from run-result.json.
Ensure exported signals exclude raw patch content, raw logs, raw docs, secrets, and customer-specific text.
Add tests for redaction and privacy flag correctness.
Document the difference between Target-owned raw artifacts and Meta-ingested sanitized signals.

expectedArtifacts: tests or fixtures when behavior changes
updated documentation if user-facing behavior changes
koObjective: raw 데이터 없이 failure code/metrics/improvement signal만 export한다.

koGuide.요약: 이 작업은 Codex가 Dev Container 안에서 자동 구현할 수 있도록 설계된 단계별 task packet입니다.
